title: Common definitions
description: Shared $defs reused across all islamicmaps.org content schemas. Reference as 'common.schema.json#/$defs/<Name>'.

Id.description: Stable, URL-safe identifier. Lowercase, digits, hyphens. Never reuse or change once published.

Ref.description: Typed reference to another document, e.g. 'asset:kaaba-3d', 'source:sealed-nectar'. Enables a normalized content graph so the client lazy-loads only what it needs (low-bandwidth).

LocalizedString.description: Map of BCP-47 locale -> string. ALWAYS include 'en'; 'ar' strongly recommended. Text direction (RTL for ar/ur/fa) is resolved at render time from the locale, not stored here.

CalendarParts.description: Numeric calendar components. Only 'year' is required; negative year = BCE / before-era.

DateValue.description: A point in time supporting Hijri + Gregorian dual calendars and explicit uncertainty. OPTIONAL wherever referenced — omit entirely for timeless content (e.g. a present-day building model).

edtf.description: Canonical Extended Date/Time Format (ISO 8601-2) string. Encodes uncertainty natively: '0622' exact, '0610?' uncertain, '062X' decade-unknown, '0622-09', '0622/0624' range, '-0001' = 2 BCE. Reuse EDTF; do not invent your own uncertainty encoding.

era.description: CE/BCE for gregorian/julian; AH for hijri.

sort_key.description: REQUIRED. Canonical proleptic-Gregorian ordinal used for timeline ordering and the global time slider, even when display is Hijri / uncertain / BCE. Recommended: fractional Gregorian year (e.g. 622.67) or Julian Day Number. Negative = BCE.

display.description: Human label per locale, e.g. {"en":"1 AH (622 CE)","ar":"١ هـ (٦٢٢ م)"}.

note.description: Scholarly note on dating / why uncertain / which interpretation.

GeoJSONGeometry.description: RFC 7946 GeoJSON geometry. Coordinates are [lng, lat] (and optional altitude).

GeometrySource.description: EITHER inline GeoJSON (small features) OR a reference to a tiled source (large geometry; the build step packs these into PMTiles/MVT so the client loads only the visible area).

feature_id.description: ID of this feature within the tile source.

CameraState.description: A map camera pose, used for playback steps and default views.

duration_ms.description: Fly-to duration for the transition INTO this pose.

InfoBlock.description: One block of explanatory / provenance content for the 'i' panel. Deliberately extensible: add new 'kind' values over time without breaking older content. Supports text, rich media and scripture references.

ReviewStatus.description: Editorial provenance. Critical for religious credibility: everything starts AI-generated and is progressively verified by scholars.

certainty.description: How settled the underlying claim is in scholarship.
